headline: Why Western Union is trying to get into stablecoin payments
summary: Scott Melker, the host of the "The Wolf of All Streets" podcast, discusses Western Union (WU (WU)), the 175-year-old money transfer giant, and its push to launch a stablecoin to bypass SWIFT banking rails and speed up payments."The Daily Wolf with Scott Melker" airs on Yahoo Finance every day at 12:00 p.m. Tune in for your daily dose of all things crypto.Make sure to also check out Yahoo Finance's new crypto hub to find the latest crypto-related news.

headline: Lineaum Launches LIN, an AI Jet Concierge with Access to 30,000+ Aircraft Worldwide. Hail. Book. Fly.
summary: Lineaum puts private jet charter “on autopilot”, allowing clients to hail a jet across 30,000+ aircraft worldwide through one automated workflow from request to booking.London, April 28, 2026 (GLOBE NEWSWIRE) -- Lineaum today announced the launch of its global private jet marketplace, providing access to more than 10,500 operators and over 30,000 aircraft worldwide. headline: PayPal Ads ID Debut Raises New Questions For Valuation And Earnings Outlook
summary: PayPal Holdings (NasdaqGS:PYPL) has launched PayPal Ads ID, a new deterministic commerce based advertising identifier. The solution uses verified accounts and purchase data from PayPal and Venmo to support audience targeting and measurement. PayPal Ads ID marks the company’s formal entry into the digital advertising identity space, adding a new use case for its transaction data. For you as an investor, PayPal Ads ID highlights how PayPal is looking beyond payment processing and money...
